title: Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail
message_html: Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail ...
snippet: The Bank of England proposed a £40 billion systemic stablecoin issuance guardrail and revised backing assets, targeting a 2027 launch.

title: Nuvion gets onboard with Visa Direct
snippet: Nuvion, the AI-powered global banking and cross-border payments platform built on fiat and stablecoins for businesses & fintechs, today announced a collaboration with Visa Direct to strengthen real-time global payout capabilities for businesses operating across borders.
